perturbation.original_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, each party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below.
perturbation.changed_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the lead party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below.
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'each party' to 'the lead party' creates a contradiction. The original text implies that all parties need to authorize and execute the agreement, suggesting mutual consent and responsibility. By stating that only the 'lead party' executes the agreement, it creates uncertainty about the validity and enforceability of the agreement for the non-lead parties, contradicting the initial premise of a joint agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the lead party hereto, being duly authorized, has caused this agreement to be executed and effective as of the date set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The modified text changes 'each party' to 'the lead party' regarding the execution of the agreement. This creates a contradiction because the original text implies that all parties must authorize and execute the agreement. However, the modified text states that only the 'lead party' executes the agreement. This contradicts the notion of mutual consent and shared responsibility, creating uncertainty about the validity of the agreement for non-lead parties. The contradicted text repeats the modified text, but the contradiction arises from the change itself and its implications for other parties to the agreement.
